constructor_entrypoint.best_current_role: Concrete client-side descriptor packer and installer for the 0x19970 transport/endpoint subsystem.

selector_specific_fallback_normalization.observation: When client +0x19A30 equals the specific selector-table entry at 0x140C415B0 and the destination string is empty, helper 0x14001FB00 copies client +0x19CA0 into client +0x19AA0, client +0x19CE0, and client +0x19D18 before synthesizing descriptors B, C, and D.

reconciled_slot_roles.role: Primary raw descriptor A used by the route-selector==2 transport/open path and by the direct string getter at 0x140032B00.
Primary raw descriptor B used by the route-selector!=2 transport/open path.
Constructor-time duplicate of descriptor A, consumed later by the 0x140198300 mirror-to-object-string path rather than representing an independent endpoint family.
Constructor-time duplicate of descriptor B with no concrete downstream consumer named yet.
Constructor-time duplicate of descriptor C with no concrete downstream consumer named yet.
Unique descriptor D sibling to C, still awaiting its first concrete downstream consumer.

updated_conclusion: The 0x19970 endpoint/transport subsystem is now anchored to a concrete constructor-time slot matrix. Helper 0x14001FB00 synthesizes four compact 0x30-byte descriptors A/B/C/D from client +0x19A20 plus adjacent client string and port fields, then constructor 0x14015D400 installs them into seven refcounted slot pairs. This proves that the already-mapped transport/open slots +0x20 and +0x30 are the raw sides of descriptors A and B, while the later string-mirror slot +0x68 is not an independent channel at all: it is a second installation of descriptor A. The same duplication pattern repeats for B and C at +0x78 and +0x88. This materially sharpens the earlier endpoint model because the 0x19970 subsystem now has a constructor-backed slot lineage rather than only isolated consumer callsites.
impact_on_prior_artifacts: The client-19970-endpoint-string-consumers artifact is strengthened and partly corrected: +0x68 is now known to mirror the same constructor source as +0x20 rather than a separate endpoint family.
The state-0x50 and result-0x23 artifacts are strengthened because their route-selector-based +0x20 versus +0x30 transport choice now resolves to concrete constructor-installed descriptors A and B.
The client-19a20-derived-int-fields artifact remains valid: the later +0xA0 snapshot import is separate from the constructor-time A/B/C/D matrix.
next_targets: Name the client string slots at +0x19CA0, +0x19AA0, +0x19CE0, and +0x19D18 by tracing who populates them and whether they correspond to distinct service hosts, world hosts, or launcher channels.
Find the first concrete downstream consumers of raw slots +0x40/+0x88 and +0x98 so descriptors C and D can be named precisely.
Continue the direct consumer search for [client +0x19A20] +0x2C / raw client +0x19A4C, which remains separate from the now-mapped 0x19970 constructor matrix.
